seoTitle: Bennett Springs vs Bentley — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bennett Springs and Bentley. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Bennett Springs vs Bentley: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bennett Springs and Bentley.
heading: Bennett Springs vs Bentley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bennett Springs, Western Australia and Bentley, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bentley has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Bennett Springs (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bennett Springs or Bentley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bennett Springs has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Bentley scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bennett Springs scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Bentley scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bennett Springs or Bentley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bentley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
